title: Gilda Sue Rosenstern: The Motion Picture!
original_title: Gilda Sue Rosenstern: The Motion Picture!
overview: A half-Jewish, half-Irish Southern belle's cocktail-fueled life of shopping and vlogging takes a turn for the strange and hilarious when daddy stops paying her bills.
